Done. The change is minimal and isolated:

- **`src/utils/redaction.ts`** — added `'apikey'` to the `SENSITIVE_HEADER_NAMES` set so that the `apikey` header is now redacted (case-insensitively) whenever `redactHeaders()` is called.
